title: stelis scaphoides
intro: Stelis scaphoides, also known as the 'Leafless Stelis' or 'Vulture Orchid', is a unique, leafless orchid species native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis scaphoides include its potential to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use by boiling its flowers or leaves in water to create a tea that can be consumed to alleviate symptoms.
